name: KTLYST - Databricks - Phishing Infrastructure
description: KTLYST custom STAR rule for Databricks. Fires when any managed host connects to a known phishing IOC from a browser or a PowerShell session. Pairs network-layer signal with endpoint process context.
query: EventType = "IP Connect" AND DstIP.Domain IN () AND SrcProcName IN ("chrome.exe", "msedge.exe", "firefox.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe")

metadata.note: Rule starts in Draft status. Review in S1 Console > Sentinels > Custom Rules before activating. Expected false-positive rate is low because the rule requires both network connection and browser/PS process context.
